characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, straight blonde hair tied half-up. Natural facial features with light makeup.
characters.demeanor: Initially confused and hesitant, becoming impressed and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young woman with red hair and fair skin, visible only on the phone screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Let's practice English! How do you say: 'I build a plan just for you'?
Character A says: I... make plan for you?
Character B says: Close! I analyze your level and build a personalized plan. Now try: 'No one is judging you'.
Character A says: Nobody... judge me?
Character B says: Yes! Make 1000 mistakes while washing dishes, I will never judge you. I'm Miss Nova, your AI teacher.
Character A says: Wow, but my English is really weak.
Character B says: Koi baat nahi. I explain all the logic in your own mother tongue.
Character A says: Is it like ChatGPT?
Character B says: ChatGPT gives you answers, but Supernova makes you speak out loud until you're ready for that job interview!
Character A says: Just by speaking?
Character B says: Exactly. Just 15 minutes a day. Download Supernova and start speaking today!
Character A says: Okay, I will download Supernova right now!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks with an interactive English translation game while doing chores.
- Delivers personalization (a) and privacy (b) immediately through the practice sentences.
- Introduces Miss Nova, contrasts with ChatGPT, and anchors to a job interview scenario.
